title: Files Gallery Divided by Groups or Statuses
excerpt: Files gallery should be divided by groups. I have some of them displaying many files, and it would be much more organized if it can be divided by groups or statuses.

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml: Files gallery should be divided by groups. I have some of them displaying many files, and it would be much more organized if it can be divided by groups or statuses.
